title: Improved Quality
description: Optimized Vanilla Experience | Better Visuals | Better Sounds | QOL Changes
body:
## Vanilla Addons is mod focusing on performance and visuals
### Fabric Loader
It uses lighweight mod loader
### Vanilla Style
Vanilla Addons dont change the content of the game
### Optifine Features
Vanilla Addons have most of optifine features!
### Optimization
Vanilla Addons uses many of optimization mods like sodium, lithium...
### Better Sounds
Vanilla Addons add next level of sound quality and ambience sounds which makes your experience more life
### Optimized Settings
Vanilla Addons has pre-setted settings which are granting you great fps with great visuals
### Your Choose
You can choose which shader pack you need more the Optimized config or High Quality config by entering the shaderpack tab ( Both Are [Complementary Shaders Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined) )
### Multiplayer Compatible
You can play multiplayer on our modpack with no worries
### Base For Mods
Add whatever mods you like and use Vanilla Addons as a base for better frame rates with mods
### Community
If you have any questions about modpack ask on [Discord](https://discord.gg/jd6NZqR9) we will be on way to help you!
### QOL
Adding many of Quality Of Live changes like jei with addons, tweaks, boat item view, stacking xp orbs, shulker box tooltip etc.
